name: Music / Media Dashboard
description: Full music player dashboard with album art background, tabbed navigation, and browsable library. Supports Playlists, Albums, Artists, and Tracks views via input_select. Uses Music Assistant (MA) sensors for library data. Built on production media dashboard.

slots.description: Navigation tab selector (options: CoverArt, Playlists, Albums, Artists, Tracks, Search)
Sensor with playlists as 'items' attribute array (name, uri, image, artist)
Sensor with albums as 'items' attribute array (name, uri, image, artist)
Sensor with artists as 'items' attribute array (name, uri, image)
Sensor with tracks as 'items' attribute array (name, uri, image, artist)

notes: mini-media-player with artwork:material stretches full card; must be first in grid DOM so it renders behind content
Navigation tabs switch via input_select.select_option service calls
auto-entities with Jinja template filter: {{ must be on SAME LINE as {% for %}
All state_attr() in for loops need 'or []' guard to prevent TypeError
styles.card background-image works here (not inside auto-entities template context, but directly on button-card)
display: block !important on :host is mandatory for scrollable list areas
scrollbar-width: thin for visual polish on scrollable areas
mass-player-card used for CoverArt view — shows full player UI with artwork, queue, controls
Album/Artist/Track play: tap = replace queue, hold = add to queue, double_tap = play next
Grid columns 5 per row for media library browsing (148x148px cards)
skeleton:
views:
  - title: Media
    path: media
    icon: mdi:music
    type: custom:grid-layout
    layout:
      grid-template-columns: 762px 500px
      grid-template-rows: 69px 100px 100px 110px 110px 111px
      gap: 0px
      padding: 0px
    cards:

      # ── BACKGROUND — album art full bleed ────────────────────────────
      - type: custom:mini-media-player
        entity: {{MEDIA_PLAYER}}
        artwork: material
        hide:
          name: true
          icon: true
          info: true
          power: true
          controls: true
          volume: true
          progress: true
        view_layout:
          grid-row: 1 / 7
          grid-column: 1 / 3
        card_mod:
          style: |
            ha-card {
              border-radius: 20px;
              width: 1260px;
              min-height: 620px;
              max-height: 620px;
              overflow: hidden !important;
            }

      # ── NAV BAR ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - type: custom:layout-card
        layout_type: custom:grid-layout
        layout:
          grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr)
          grid-template-rows: 50px
          gap: 4px
        view_layout:
          grid-row: 1
          grid-column: 1
        cards:
          - type: custom:button-card
            entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
            name: Now Playing
            tap_action:
              action: call-service
              service: input_select.select_option
              target:
                entity_id: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
              data:
                option: CoverArt
          - type: custom:button-card
            entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
            name: Playlists
            tap_action:
              action: call-service
              service: input_select.select_option
              target:
                entity_id: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
              data:
                option: Playlists
          - type: custom:button-card
            entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
            name: Albums
            tap_action:
              action: call-service
              service: input_select.select_option
              target:
                entity_id: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
              data:
                option: Albums
          - type: custom:button-card
            entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
            name: Artists
            tap_action:
              action: call-service
              service: input_select.select_option
              target:
                entity_id: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
              data:
                option: Artists
          - type: custom:button-card
            entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
            name: Tracks
            tap_action:
              action: call-service
              service: input_select.select_option
              target:
                entity_id: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
              data:
                option: Tracks
          - type: custom:button-card
            entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
            name: Search
            tap_action:
              action: call-service
              service: input_select.select_option
              target:
                entity_id: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
              data:
                option: Search

      # ── CONTENT AREA ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - type: custom:layout-card
        layout_type: custom:grid-layout
        layout:
          grid-template-columns: 760px
          grid-template-rows: 550px
        view_layout:
          grid-row: 2 / 7
          grid-column: 1
        cards:

          # Now Playing — mass-player-card full UI
          - type: conditional
            conditions:
              - condition: state
                entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
                state: CoverArt
            card:
              type: custom:mass-player-card
              entities:
                - {{MEDIA_PLAYER}}
              player:
                hide:
                  power: true
                layout:
                  controls_layout: compact
                  artwork_size: large
              expressive: true
              expressive_scheme: neutral
              card_mod:
                style: |
                  ha-card {
                    border-radius: 20px;
                    height: 550px !important;
                    overflow: scroll !important;
                  }

          # Playlists — auto-entities 5-col grid
          - type: conditional
            conditions:
              - condition: state
                entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
                state: Playlists
            card:
              type: custom:auto-entities
              show_empty: true
              card:
                type: grid
                square: false
                columns: 5
                card_mod:
                  style: |
                    ha-card { overflow-x: hidden !important; }
              card_param: cards
              filter:
                template: >
                  {% for element in state_attr('{{PLAYLISTS_SENSOR}}', 'items') or [] %} {{
                    {
                      "type": "custom:button-card",
                      "show_icon": false,
                      "show_label": true,
                      "show_name": true,
                      "label": element.artist | default(''),
                      "name": element.name,
                      "tap_action": {
                        "action": "call-service",
                        "service": "media_player.play_media",
                        "service_data": {
                          "entity_id": "{{MEDIA_PLAYER}}",
                          "media_content_id": element.uri,
                          "media_content_type": "playlist",
                          "enqueue": "replace"
                        }
                      },
                      "hold_action": {
                        "action": "call-service",
                        "service": "media_player.play_media",
                        "service_data": {
                          "entity_id": "{{MEDIA_PLAYER}}",
                          "media_content_id": element.uri,
                          "media_content_type": "playlist",
                          "enqueue": "add"
                        }
                      },
                      "styles": {
                        "card": [
                          {"background-image": "linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0) 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 100%), url(" + (element.image if element.image else '/local/placeholder.png') + ")"},
                          {"background-size": "cover"},
                          {"background-position": "center"},
                          {"border-radius": "12px"},
                          {"height": "148px"},
                          {"width": "148px"}
                        ],
                        "name": [
                          {"color": "white"}, {"font-weight": "700"}, {"font-size": "13px"},
                          {"text-align": "left"}, {"padding": "0 8px 4px 8px"},
                          {"text-shadow": "0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.8)"}
                        ],
                        "label": [
                          {"color": "rgba(255,255,255,0.75)"}, {"font-size": "11px"},
                          {"text-align": "left"}, {"padding": "0 8px 8px 8px"},
                          {"text-shadow": "0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.8)"}
                        ],
                        "grid": [{"grid-template-areas": "'i' 'i' 'i' 'i' 'n' 'l'"}, {"grid-template-rows": "29px 29px 29px 29px auto auto"}]
                      },
                      "extra_styles": "@media (hover: hover) { ha-card:hover { opacity: 0.75 !important; transition: opacity 0.2s ease; } }"
                    }
                  }}, {% endfor %}
              card_mod:
                style: |
                  :host {
                    height: 550px !important;
                    overflow-y: scroll !important;
                    overflow-x: hidden !important;
                    display: block !important;
                    scrollbar-width: thin !important;
                  }

          # Albums — auto-entities 5-col grid (same pattern as Playlists)
          - type: conditional
            conditions:
              - condition: state
                entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
                state: Albums
            card:
              type: custom:auto-entities
              show_empty: true
              card:
                type: grid
                square: false
                columns: 5
              card_param: cards
              filter:
                template: >
                  {% set items = state_attr('{{ALBUMS_SENSOR}}', 'items') %}
                  {% if items is iterable and items | count > 0 %}
                    {% for element in items %} {{
                      {
                        "type": "custom:button-card",
                        "show_icon": false,
                        "show_label": true,
                        "show_name": true,
                        "label": element.artist | default(''),
                        "name": element.name,
                        "tap_action": {
                          "action": "call-service",
                          "service": "media_player.play_media",
                          "service_data": {
                            "entity_id": "{{MEDIA_PLAYER}}",
                            "media_content_id": element.uri,
                            "media_content_type": "album",
                            "enqueue": "replace"
                          }
                        },
                        "styles": {
                          "card": [
                            {"background-image": "linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0) 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 100%), url(" + (element.image if element.image else '/local/placeholder.png') + ")"},
                            {"background-size": "cover"}, {"background-position": "center"},
                            {"border-radius": "12px"}, {"height": "148px"}, {"width": "148px"}
                          ]
                        }
                      }
                    }}, {% endfor %}
                  {% endif %}
              card_mod:
                style: |
                  :host {
                    height: 550px !important;
                    overflow-y: scroll !important;
                    overflow-x: hidden !important;
                    display: block !important;
                    scrollbar-width: thin !important;
                  }
